extraction.one_line_summary: KWIATKOWSKI Michal timed his effort perfectly in final 300m after CARAPAZ Richard burned out from 700m attack on steep finish
tactical_patterns: Carapaz attacked from 700m out on steep finish but gradient cashed him out before 300m, showing premature timing.
Kwiatkowski conserved energy while Quick-Step Plus controlled behind Carapaz, launching only at 300m to exploit early attacker's fade.
Sky positioned Kwiatkowski on wheels of other contenders rather than leadout, relying on uphill sprint power over train.
BMC De Marchi and Teuns defended but never countered Carapaz despite being marked threats, purely reactive approach failed.

rider_signals.CARAPAZ Richard: negative: Giro stage winner mistimed steep finish badly, going 700m too early and getting swallowed before final 300m
rider_signals.KWIATKOWSKI Michal: positive: Showed elite positioning discipline and uphill sprint power, waiting until 300m on very steep gradient
rider_signals.TEUNS Dylan: negative: Defending champion sat on Carapaz wheel passively, made no counter-effort despite favorable position
rider_signals.DE PLUS Laurens: neutral: Quick-Step controlled chase effectively but De Plus couldn't finish despite being well-positioned
